message:
fix(test): fix flaky age_cleanup_boundary_exactly_at_cutoff timing test

Add +100ms buffer to session timestamp to account for wall-clock drift
between the test's epoch_ms() call and delete_sessions_by_age's internal
epoch_ms() call. Without this, the test intermittently fails under load
when milliseconds elapse between the two calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
